findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "check_pqc_risk" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Instant check (no DB, no scan) — returns whether a list of algorithm names are quantum-vulnerable. Useful for quick risk assessment before calling scan_reposito…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
